title: Scottish Highlands Wild Camp
subtitle: Stargazing, lochs & untamed wilderness
overview: Escape into the raw beauty of the Scottish Highlands on this guided wild camping experience. Sleep under a canopy of stars, explore ancient glens, and connect with nature in one of Europe's last true wildernesses.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Base Camp
itinerary.description: Meet at Inverness, travel to camp, set up tents, evening campfire dinner.

itinerary.title: Loch Hike & Foraging
itinerary.description: Full day hike through Glen Affric, wild foraging, open fire lunch, stargazing night.

itinerary.title: Morning swim & Departure
itinerary.description: Optional loch dip, pack down camp, return to Inverness by noon.

title: Lake District Glamping Retreat
subtitle: Luxury bell tents with stunning lakeside views
overview: Experience the Lake District from a beautifully furnished bell tent. Enjoy yoga at sunrise, kayaking on the lake, and a chef-prepared dinner under the stars.

itinerary.title: Arrive & Settle In
itinerary.description: Check in to your bell tent, afternoon kayaking, sunset dinner by the lake.

itinerary.title: Sunrise Yoga & Departure
itinerary.description: Guided sunrise yoga, full breakfast, check out by 11am.
